name: ProteusAI
description: Train a model on experimental data to predict fitness of protein variants. Suggest new designs through Bayesian optimization over sequence space.
capabilities: Train a model on experimental data to predict fitness of protein variants
Suggest new designs through Bayesian optimization over sequence space

experimentalData.description: CSV file with protein variants and their experimental fitness values

numDesigns.description: Number of new variant designs to suggest via Bayesian optimization
